meta_title: For Founders: testing automation to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to testing automation and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Testing Automation to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop staring at a blank screen. Use this advanced checklist to leverage testing automation, Antigravity, and Claude Code to validate SaaS ideas rapidly.
content.answer_block: The 'no project idea' paralysis is a failure of validation, not creativity. By building automated testing suites for micro-SaaS prototypes, you force functional clarity. This workflow uses Antigravity and Claude Code to transform abstract concepts into testable, revenue-generating assets, effectively automating the discovery of market-fit through rapid, iterative code execution.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank IDE, the cursor blinking with rhythmic indifference. The 'no project idea' trap isn't just about a lack of imagination; it's a lack of feedback loops. You are waiting for a lightning bolt of genius, while the market is waiting for someone to solve the mundane friction that actually pays the bills.

True founders don't wait for inspiration; they engineer it through aggressive testing. By pivoting your workflow toward automated testing, you stop building in a vacuum. You start building against real-world scenarios, turning the act of testing into a discovery engine that reveals where the money is actually hiding.

steps.title: Define the Friction Point
steps.description: Identify a specific B2B process that is currently manual and error-prone. We will write a test suite that simulates the automation of this process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a test suite architecture for a headless browser automation tool that handles data scraping and processing for [Insert Industry] workflows.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Initialize a Playwright test project for automated data extraction workflows'

steps.title: Build the Mock-Data Harness
steps.description: Don't build the app yet; build the data validator. If you can test the input/output of a problem, you have a product.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust mock data generator that produces edge-case inputs for a SaaS API endpoint.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create a schema-driven mock data generator in /tests/mocks'

steps.title: Implement 'Test-First' Discovery
steps.description: Write failing tests that define exactly what the 'done' state of a profitable feature looks like.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write five integration tests that assert the success criteria for an automated [Insert Feature] SaaS module.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Write integration tests in Vitest ensuring correct API response handling'

steps.title: Automate the Feedback Loop
steps.description: Configure Claude Code to monitor your tests and refactor the underlying implementation autonomously.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a CI configuration that runs the test suite on every commit and reports failure metrics to a dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Configure GitHub Actions for automated test execution on push'

steps.title: Iterate via Performance Benchmarking
steps.description: Use performance tests to identify if your automated solution is faster than the manual alternative, justifying a premium price.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a benchmarking script to measure execution time of the core automation engine under high load.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Add a performance benchmark test to verify sub-second response times'

pro_tips: Treat your test suite as your product documentation; if a feature is hard to test, it is likely a bad feature to build.
Use Claude Code to 'explain' failing tests to you—often the error message reveals a business logic gap, not a coding error.
Focus on 'happy path' tests first to prove value, then 'edge case' tests to prove reliability.
Automate your deployment pipeline so that tests are the gatekeeper to production; never deploy manual code.
If your tests run in under 30 seconds, you are testing too little; if they take over 10 minutes, your architecture is likely bloated.
content.next_steps: Deploy your validated test suite to a staging environment and run it against 100 iterations of your mock data to ensure robustness before shipping to your first beta users.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for yourself and start building for the market using high-velocity automation. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
